title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 04 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 04/01/2022
Image reference: 2022-01-04_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-04-2022_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have firmed. LR2 Prostar (115,600 DWT, Jan 2019, Daehan) sold to Greek buyers for USD 52.00 mil, VV value USD 51.50 mil - DD Due. Small Chemical Tanker Daeho Sun Star (8,800 DWT, Jan 2002, Usuki Zosensho) sold for USD 4.90 mil, VV value USD 4.81 mil - SS/DD Due.
